task_name: Add Local MVP Chain Checkpoint Through Human Gate
goal: Document the current local MVP chain through Human Gate Candidate and define the next safe boundary without enabling approval, task creation, execution, or live Builder access.
claims: BP-056 documents the local MVP chain through Human Gate Candidate.
BP-056 identifies which chain stages are locally reviewable and which actions remain blocked.
BP-056 does not implement approval, UI, Builder task creation, execution, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or live Builder access.
assumptions: BP-055 completed fixture coverage visibility for the Human Gate Candidate stage.
A checkpoint is needed before expanding toward any approval UI, Builder adapter, or task-create readiness work.
The next safe step should remain local and fixture-based unless a later explicit readiness task changes that boundary.
dod: The document states the local chain stages, current review suite entry point, blocked actions, open gaps, and next safe step.
The document explicitly blocks approval effect, Task Create, Execute, Approve, Push, Deploy, auth, secrets, DB, and live Builder calls.
stop_conditions: Runtime, fixture, package, or tool changes become necessary
Effective approval, live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, execution, task creation, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-055 made Human Gate Candidate fixture coverage visible and cleared the way for a local MVP chain checkpoint.
